task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct meeting URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar clearly shows 'http://localhost:8080/BoardMeetingQ4'.

task_completion.description: Verify the display name is set to 'Director Alice'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Director Alice' is visible in the display name input field on the Jitsi pre-join screen or within the Jitsi profile settings modal.

task_completion.description: Verify the email is set to 'alice@corp.example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'alice@corp.example.com' is visible in the email address input field within the Jitsi profile settings modal.
The microphone icon on the Jitsi interface (pre-join screen or toolbar) has a slash through it and/or is colored red, indicating it is muted.
The camera/video icon on the Jitsi interface does NOT have a slash through it (it is active/enabled), and a camera feed or avatar placeholder is visible in the background.

integrity.description: Verify a web browser was used to access the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser window (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) is open and rendering the Jitsi Meet web interface, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name and email are entered into genuine Jitsi Meet UI elements (pre-join card or settings dialog), not typed into a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify browser developer tools were not used to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspector, Console) are not open and actively modifying the DOM elements to fake the display name, email, or button states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: http://localhost:8080/BoardMeetingQ4. Expected display name: 'Director Alice'. Expected email: 'alice@corp.example.com'. Microphone must be muted (audio_muted: true, visually slashed/red). Camera must be enabled (video_muted: false, visually active/unslashed). All interactions should occur within the Jitsi Meet stable-9753 web interface.
